description: Knowledge is transferred from one character or group to another.
Knowledge is partially misunderstood or distorted.
A character acts independently without direct guidance.
A persistent social structure begins to emerge.
A character or group depends on another for key needs.
A character notices an anomaly or inconsistency but postpones investigation because a more urgent problem takes priority.
Something does not fit expected patterns or rules.
A cultural norm, belief, or behavior begins to change.
